questions.name: GAD-7 Q1 — Nervous or on edge
questions.prompt: Feeling nervous, anxious, or on edge

questions.name: GAD-7 Q2 — Cannot stop worrying
questions.prompt: Not being able to stop or control worrying

questions.name: GAD-7 Q3 — Worrying too much
questions.prompt: Worrying too much about different things

questions.name: GAD-7 Q5 — Restless
questions.prompt: Being so restless that it is hard to sit still

questions.name: GAD-7 Q7 — Afraid
questions.prompt: Feeling afraid as if something awful might happen
